title: Use Blocks on Transportation│對交通工具使用方塊
description: You can add a specific block to a transportation by using it on it.│你可以透過向交通工具使用特定方塊將其加裝上去。
body:
# Function│功能
- When you are Sneaking and holding a chest with your main or off-hand, you can use this block on boat to attach blocks to it.│當你潛行並且用主手或副手拿著箱子時，你可以對船使用該方塊為其安裝上方塊。
- When you are Sneaking and holding a chest, hopper, TNT, or furnace with your main or off-hand, you can use this block on minecart to attach blocks to it.│當你潛行並且用主手或副手拿著箱子、漏斗、TNT或熔爐時，你可以對礦車使用該方塊為其安裝上方塊。
